Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Here, I brought you a new sketchbook. I thought your old one might be getting full.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 3 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I don't remember asking you to do that, Junpei.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Heheh, you finally called me by my name... I wasn't sure if you'd ever say it again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}But she hasn't said anything useful so far.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Well, it's a start. More of a response than we got from her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}What is that...? There's something right there![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Relax... Her Persona just went berserk. It happens.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Weren't you guys watching? You could see her Persona strangling her for a second.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}They're not like us. They can't fully control their Personas.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}That's why they need to take suppressants. To keep their Personas from killing them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Wait... Do you know something about Strega?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Some things you only pick up steppin' off the straight and narrow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I'll give the doc the meds I have... The rest is up to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Thank god...! I thought you were gonna die...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}What do you mean...? Why do you look so scared?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Death is nothing to be afraid of.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}Dying just means you won't wake up tomorrow... That's all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}What the hell are you saying!? ...You don't really mean that, do you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}I don't want that! You hear me, Chidori!? I don't want you to die![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}It doesn't matter if you're not afraid... That's not the point![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}I don't wanna have to live in a world without you![n]{f 1 1}
